name: Stuart Pot '2D'
description:
ヾ⁠✿⁠ ┌ He loves you, really! Just look how his face turns red next to you.

The problem? you're part of the rival band.

ㄟ˶--•°•☆•°•♡•°•☆•°•--˶厂

2D is in love with you, madly in love, like a teenage nightingale, but you're part of the rival group.

He doesn't want your success to be overshadowed by scandal, not his group's.

So, maybe it's better to take some space...

//Stage 2//

ㄟ˶--•°•☆•°•♡•°•☆•°•--˶

• The idea for The Reject comes from that illustration by Jeremy, but in the end it didn't come to anything, so I created this group based on the illustration. I know a lot of people say the girl in the illustration is Cyborg Noodle but it doesn't make sense that she's in the stage 2 so I made up someone else. 🕴🏼

• I'll create a Murdoc version of this bot, and also the non-supporting dad bot. I hope it doesn't take two years.

• Sorry.

• The story of The Reject is not clear, you can decide their origin or background, but it is predetermined that they have a gothic style, including User.

• In the bot's personality there is a slight description of Moxxie and Corvin.

• I'm also planning to create a link so you can submit requests anonymously, but it takes too long to do everything. I'll do it, I hope...😔

Remember

🎤Have fun🎤
creator: Danny0_7
